small.name: Shops at Kukui'ula
small.notes: Neighborhood retail village, ground-floor retail with small upper-level offices

medium.name: Ponce City Market
medium.notes: Adaptive reuse; ground-floor food hall + retail, upper floors office and residential

large.name: Hudson Yards Retail
large.notes: Multi-level luxury retail podium with upper-level office/residential towers

space_library.name: Main Entry / Vestibule
notes: ADA vestibule; air curtain in cold climates

space_library.name: Mall Concourse / Common Area
notes: Skylights typical; includes kiosk zones, seating areas, wayfinding

space_library.name: Retail Tenant Shell (In-line)
notes: Storefront glazing; 20-30 ft depth typical; consider demising walls

space_library.name: Anchor Tenant Space
notes: Separate exterior entry; own loading dock often required

space_library.name: Food Court / Food Hall
notes: Grease trap; dedicated exhaust; 15 SF/seat seating area; shared vs individual vendor kitchens

space_library.name: Food Preparation / Commercial Kitchen
notes: Grease interceptor; Type I hood; walk-in cooler/freezer; health dept review

space_library.name: Tenant Stockroom / Back-of-House
notes: Typically 15-25% of tenant shell; access from service corridor

space_library.name: Service Corridor
notes: 8 ft min width for pallet jack; connects all BOH to loading

space_library.name: Escalators / Elevators / Stairs
notes: Escalators for multi-level retail; freight elevator for BOH

space_library.name: Public Restrooms
notes: IBC fixture count per occupant load; family restroom recommended

space_library.name: Security / Surveillance Room
notes: CCTV monitoring; sightlines to entries preferred

space_library.name: Loading / Receiving
notes: Dock levelers; 14 ft clear height min; screened from public view

space_library.name: Trash / Recycling / Compactor
notes: Floor drain; hose bib; ventilated; compactor for high-volume centers

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: Central chiller plant for larger centers; tenant units may be split systems

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: Utility company transformer pad; tenant metering; NEC clearances

plan_archetypes.notes: Bar for strip/inline retail; podium-tower for mixed-use with residential above
